criteria.criterion: DBB-001: embed('hello world') returns float32 array with length > 0, all finite
DBB-002: embed('') returns [] or throws clear error
DBB-003: store.set/get persists across process restart
DBB-004: store.delete removes key, subsequent get returns null/undefined
DBB-005: store.get nonexistent key returns null/undefined, no exception
DBB-006: GET /api/status includes devices array with registered devices
DBB-007: GET /api/status with no devices returns devices: []
DBB-008: POST /api/chat with tools returns tool_use content block
DBB-009: POST /api/chat without tools returns text content block
